name: Parse RSS feed and extract structured article data
prompt: Parse the RSS feed in feed.xml and extract the articles into articles.json with: (1) feed_title: the channel title, (2) feed_description: the channel description, (3) article_count: number of items, (4) articles: array of objects with title, link, description, pub_date (ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD), and category for each item, (5) categories: array of unique category names sorted alphabetically, (6) latest_article: the title of the most recent article by date, (7) oldest_article: the title of the oldest article by date.

criteria.testPattern: 6 articles|first article|has required fields|dates in ISO

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
